content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (`SecureField` in App/LoginView.swift:9) but review credentials are placeholders (`test`/`changeme`) and notes are `TBD` (review_information/demo_user.txt, demo_password.txt, notes.txt).
Pierre: Apple reviewers need working credentials and actionable steps to reach your core features, or they will reject the build for being unable to log in. Here the demo user is `test`, the password is `changeme`, and the notes just say `TBD` — none of these are usable. Replace them with real working credentials and notes explaining how to reach paywalls or gated functionality before submitting.
